title: Mission Dashboard + Capability Drill-Down
changes: Server: GET /api/mission-overview endpoint returns capabilities with progress
Server: GET /api/capabilities/:capId endpoint returns requirements + tasks with status
Client: loadMissionDashboard() fetches real data and renders cap-cards with progress bars
Client: showCapabilityDetail() drill-down shows requirements list and tasks with status badges and role colors
Client: Back navigation from drill-down via hideCapabilityDetail()
